query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A gradient image transitioning from dark brownish-black at the top to light warm gray at the bottom, with numerous small scattered dark specks distributed across the entire frame, and a single small curved dark mark near the right side.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract gradient image with no recognizable subject, transitioning from dark brownish-black at the top to light warm gray at the bottom, covered in scattered dark specks and a small curved mark, functioning purely through tonal shift, texture, and formal qualities rather than representational content.
